name: Juspay
description: Global payments operating system and orchestration platform built in India; routes transactions across 300+ PSPs, processes $1T+ TPV for 500+ enterprises.

seo.title: Juspay — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Juspay: Global payments operating system and orchestration platform built in India; routes transactions across 300+ PSPs, processes $1T+ TPV for 500+ enterprise

when_to_use: Payment orchestration routing across 300+ PSPs via single integration
Smart retry and fallback logic across acquirers for enterprise checkout
Hypercheckout SDK reducing checkout friction for high-volume platforms
Tokenization and network token management across multiple payment processors

pros: 300+ PSP connectors with deep routing logic
Strong India, SEA, and emerging-market coverage
Global roadmap backed by real enterprise scale
cons: Opinionated stack that can be heavy to integrate
Feature depth uneven outside India and SEA
review.verdict: One of the few orchestrators with true enterprise battle testing; not lightweight, but credible at top-of-market scale.
review.best_for: Large enterprises processing significant volume in India, SEA, or globally who need proven routing at scale.
review.not_for: Early-stage merchants or teams wanting a self-serve, low-lift orchestration SDK.
